session_hint: the feature branch integration strategy for the monorepo
question: What did we settle on as the final integration strategy for feature branches?
turns: Standardizing the git workflow for the monorepo. Proposal: always rebase feature branches onto main before merging to keep history linear and bisect-friendly.
Rebase policy written up in CONTRIBUTING.md. Pre-push hook blocks merge commits. Team agreed to it.
Several engineers reported that rebasing onto main is brutal on the shared packages directory — people are spending 45 minutes resolving conflicts on every PR. Productivity is tanking.

Changed our minds on rebase. Switching to merge commits with --no-ff so each PR preserves its original branch context in history. Linear history isn't worth the conflict overhead. Final strategy: merge commits.
